# PR Review Skill

## Architecture Compliance Checklist

- [ ] New files placed in the correct feature module directory
- [ ] File names follow naming conventions from architecture instructions
- [ ] Entry layer handles dispatch only — no business logic
- [ ] Business logic lives in services
- [ ] Data models co-located within feature module

## Dependency Direction Verification

- [ ] Imports flow in the allowed direction only
- [ ] No feature module imports another feature module
- [ ] No reverse dependencies (service → entry layer)
- [ ] Global providers injected via constructor, not imported directly

## Test Coverage

- [ ] New code has co-located test files
- [ ] Tests follow the mocking patterns from testing instructions
- [ ] Error paths and edge cases are tested
- [ ] Tests use `clearAllMocks` in `beforeEach`

## Naming Conventions

- [ ] Modules, services, entry layer files follow established patterns
- [ ] DTOs / input types follow action-entity pattern
- [ ] Test files use `.spec.ts` suffix, co-located beside source

## Security Basics

- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] No unvalidated user input passed to database queries
- [ ] Sensitive data not logged or exposed in error messages

## References

- `.github/instructions/architecture.instructions.md` — module structure, dependency rules
- `.github/instructions/testing.instructions.md` — test patterns and expectations
